content: We can reframe the intrinsic reward comparison between ICM, RND, and other curious RL agents as an emergent A2A protocol where each curious agent bids for exploration priority based on its intrinsic reward signal, with the collective A2A negotiation producing more robust exploration than any single curiosity method alone. This turns a static comparison of curiosity methods into a dynamic, multi-agent coordination mechanism for open-ended exploration.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
